checks.detail: PetClinicService uses @RegisterRestClient, @GET, @Path, @PathParam from Jakarta RS. Interface name ends with 'Service'. baseUri points to localhost:9966.
PetClinicMcpServer has @Tool on listPets() and getPet(). Parameters annotated with @ToolArg. Returns ToolResponse.success(new TextContent(...)). REST client injected via @RestClient.
petclinic-mcp container added to Deployment pod spec alongside petclinic. Port 8888 exposed in both container spec and Service. Original container and Service/Route unchanged.
pom.xml not modified; quarkus-mcp-server-http and quarkus-rest-client-jackson already present.
